title: Does podman  support Notary
body:
Does podman 4.1.1  support Notary and which kind of signature methods does podman currently support?
Looking forward to your reply,thanks.

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out.

Podman does not support Notary but it supports [simple signing](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/docs/tutorials/image_signing.md) and [sigstore](https://www.sigstore.dev/).
